stemHtml: Which statement is true about the Direct Reading Compass (DRC)?

options.a: Before Take Off the DRC should be checked by comparing the heading to the runway direction.
options.b: The DRC is serviceable when the indication during take off differs by not more than 2 degrees from the runway true direction.
options.c: The DRC is serviceable when the indication is within 2 degrees of the magnetic track on the navigation chart.
options.d: The heading of the DRC can only be checked with the runway direction after allowing for magnetic variation.
